Everyone's been living peacefully the past few months. In fact,

Still, don't be fooled. Who knows when the demons are planning

When something bad happens, wash it all away as you do the laundry.

Doing laundry's become enjoyable again! I'm going to clean all

Head to Bohelos's Estate. If you leave the farmlands to the left,
